requirement: Each installation shall remain organization-owned and shall not depend on a Veoveo vendor control plane, hosted service, or canonical domain name.
notes: Client-specific identity and ingress remain installation configuration

requirement: Hosted domains shall use the complete MCP protocol surface where it fits, including resources, templates, prompts, completions, tasks, subscriptions, notifications, structured content, and URI identities.
Every externally reachable MCP or administrative operation shall pass through profile selection, policy evaluation, and audit at the gateway.
notes: Unknown profiles servers methods resources and targets fail closed

requirement: Provider job completion shall be accepted only from a signed provider webhook and shall never poll provider status.
verification_evidence: servers/media-mcp tests; testing/smoke webhook-only media scenarios; docs/TECH_DESIGN.md
notes: Missing webhook delivery is an operational failure

requirement: Long-running operations shall use one durable task authority with explicit idempotency, leases, recovery class, cancellation, results, retention, and ordered event delivery.
notes: There is no server-local in-memory task registry

requirement: Artifact occurrences and bytes shall remain tenant-isolated and shall enforce labels, grants, release state, retention, and bounded sharing.
verification_evidence: platform/artifacts tests; servers/artifact-mcp tests; testing/smoke artifact scenarios
notes: Artifact hashes are not public identities

requirement: World and sensor producers shall push typed Rerun streams into a private durable recording boundary that preserves crash-decodable evidence.
verification_evidence: platform/recordings/hub tests; testing/smoke hub scenario; docs/RECORDINGS.md

requirement: Perception shall run locally over authorized recorded data with bounded GPU execution and shall publish governed derived results.
verification_evidence: servers/perception-mcp tests and GPU smoke; servers/perception-mcp/DESIGN.md
notes: No hosted inference dependency or CPU inference fallback

requirement: Autonomous agents shall persist wakes, episodes, task descriptors, retries, results, and retention pins across process restart.
verification_evidence: agents/kernel tests; agents/runtime tests; testing/smoke agent-kernel scenario
notes: Chat history is not the source of truth

requirement: Browser JavaScript shall never receive the gateway bearer and every unsafe console request shall enforce CSRF.
verification_evidence: apps/console/bff tests; console build checks; testing/smoke console scenarios
notes: Console BFF is the only browser session boundary

requirement: An offline installation shall verify all transferred files and images and shall not require network access during loading or operation of provider-independent capabilities.
notes: Provider-dependent features may be unavailable offline

requirement: Compose and Helm shall instantiate the same canonical service graph while retaining form-specific controls for storage, ingress, network policy, and mTLS.
notes: SurrealDB HA is outside the stated baseline

requirement: Analytical users shall retain arbitrary DuckDB SQL within owner-scoped workspaces bounded by engine, filesystem, process, resource, and network controls.
verification_evidence: servers/duckdb-mcp tests; testing/smoke DuckDB scenarios; servers/duckdb-mcp/DESIGN.md
notes: DuckDB is not the platform coordination database

requirement: The platform shall support governed map acquisition, release activation, restrictions, geodesy, routing, reachable areas, and logistics matrices through stable map identities.
verification_evidence: servers/map-mcp tests; servers/map-mcp/DESIGN.md; gateway catalog validation
notes: Route products retain release and restriction dependencies

requirement: Known platform and domain contracts shall use typed structs, enums, identifiers, and schemas; raw JSON shall remain confined to genuinely opaque provider boundaries.
verification_evidence: cargo test workspace; Python type and test suite; gateway configuration schema validation
notes: Domain schemas stay with the owning server

requirement: Only the gateway shall sign short-lived internal identity assertions and hosted services shall validate the key identifier, audience, tenant, principal, labels, scopes, and expiry.
verification_evidence: platform/gateway authentication tests; Python SDK tests; testing/smoke
notes: Hosted services receive public trust keys only

requirement: SurrealDB shall remain the sole platform coordination authority; transactional outbox replay shall remain authoritative over best-effort live delivery.
notes: DuckDB and RRD serve analytical and recording purposes

requirement: New hosted servers shall compose through shared contracts and the gateway catalog without leaking server-specific behavior into generic gateway modules.
verification_evidence: templates/python-mcp tests; gateway catalog validation; testing/mcp-conformance
